description_long: This office building features a striking Y-shaped footprint with three prominent wings radiating from a central core. The exterior is defined by alternating bands of glossy black and reflective glass, creating a dynamic, layered appearance. The facade is composed of horizontal strips, with the glass sections likely serving as continuous ribbon windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The roofline is undulating and sculptural, with a checkered pattern that adds visual interest and a sense of movement. The building appears to have four distinct floors, each separated by the dark horizontal bands. The overall design is highly modern, with a focus on geometric forms and sleek materials.
description: A modern, Y-shaped office building with four floors, featuring alternating glossy black and glass bands and a sculptural, checkered roofline.
description_view_0: This view highlights the building's Y-shaped plan and the layered, alternating black and glass facade, with the checkered roof pattern most visible.
description_view_1: From this angle, the central core and the three radiating wings are prominent, emphasizing the building's symmetry and the undulating roof.
description_view_2: This side view showcases the horizontal banding of the facade and the curvature of the wings, with the glass sections reflecting light.
description_view_3: The rear perspective reveals the depth of the wings and the consistent window pattern, as well as the sculptural quality of the roof.
attribute_window_pattern: Continuous horizontal ribbon windows with regular spacing, forming bands around each floor.
